query:
SELECT
                    COUNT(*) AS "total!",
                    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS "last_7!",
                    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') AS "last_30!",
                    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_frozen) AS "frozen!",
                    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_admin) AS "admin!"
                FROM users
